name: io.github.lonexreb/citeguard
description: Free, open, OpenAlex-native watchdog for retracted and problematic citations. Flags references that are retracted, corrected, or under an expression of concern, reconciling Retraction Watch, OpenAlex, and Crossref conservatively.

environmentVariables.name: OPENALEX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAlex API key (required for live OpenAlex lookups and watch_institution).

environmentVariables.name: CITEGUARD_MAILTO
environmentVariables.description: Contact email for the OpenAlex/Crossref polite pool.
